CATALYST-BLUE_SLEIGH_BELL.description: Your positive finite [gold]Grow[/gold] and [gold]Shrink[/gold] applications use Catalyst's stack-scaling rules instead of the vanilla flat-strength version. Vanilla enemy and potion Shrink sources remain unchanged.
CATALYST-BLUE_SLEIGH_BELL.flavor: A placeholder bell for very loud mass problems.
CATALYST-BLUE_SLEIGH_BELL.title: Blue Sleigh Bell
